findings.description: RST anchor label `WebView_SingleCheckBoxTag` is defined on the checkboxタグ section in the source (`.. _WebView_SingleCheckBoxTag:`) but is absent from s4 hints. Other documents may reference this section by this label.

RST anchor label `WebView_ListSelectCommon` is defined on the List型変数共通属性 section in the source (`.. _WebView_ListSelectCommon:`) but is absent from s6 hints. Other documents may reference this section by this label.
